title: MS SQL Rationalization Abbreviation Dictionary Schema
description: JSON Schema for the federal-IT abbreviation dictionary used by Phase 2 name-similarity heuristics in the MS SQL Estate Rationalization Process. Each entry maps a common abbreviation (e.g., 'emp') to its canonical expansion (e.g., 'employee') so column-name similarity scoring can normalize before comparing.

abbreviation.description: The abbreviated form as it commonly appears in column / table names. Lowercase, alphanumeric + underscore.

expansion.description: The canonical expansion to use during normalization.

aliases.description: Other equivalent abbreviations that should normalize to the same expansion.

domain_hint.description: Optional disambiguation when one abbreviation has different meanings in different domains.
